description: P2P collateralised lending protocol on Liquid using SimplicityHL covenants. Borrower locks collateral in a PreLockCovenant and advertises terms via bit-packed Parameter NFTs. A Lender accepts by providing the principal, activating the LendingCovenant. Settlement is either repayment (borrower returns principal+interest, reclaims collateral) or liquidation (lender claims collateral after loan expiry). All covenants are enforced on-chain via Simplicity programs; no trusted backend is required.

p2pk.description: Simple Schnorr-signature covenant (p2pk.simf) keyed to BORROWER_PUB_KEY. Used as the borrower's principal-payment and NFT-release address.

pre_lock.description: Collateral held in the PreLockCovenant while the borrower's offer is open. Two spending paths: PATH::LEFT (create_lending_path) allows a lender to activate the loan; PATH::RIGHT (cancel_pre_lock_path) allows the borrower to cancel with a Schnorr signature, burning all Utility NFTs.

lending_collateral.description: Collateral locked in the active LendingCovenant. Released via repayment (borrower returns principal+interest, reclaims collateral) or liquidation (lender claims collateral after LOAN_EXPIRATION_TIME).

prelock_script_auth.description: ScriptAuth covenant wrapping Utility NFTs during the offer phase. Verifies co-spending with the pre_lock UTXO.

lending_script_auth.description: ScriptAuth covenant wrapping Parameter NFTs and the Borrower NFT during the active loan phase. Verifies co-spending with the lending_collateral UTXO.

lender_principal_vault.description: AssetAuth covenant holding the principal+interest payment from the borrower. The lender withdraws by co-spending and burning the Lender NFT.

Prepare.description: Utility method to split a utxo into 4 utxos for the IssueUtilityNFTs action

inputs.description: Wallet UTXO to split into 4 for IssueUtilityNFTs

PrepareLender.description: Utility: ensure the lender wallet has a PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT-sat UTXO of PRINCIPAL_ASSET_ID ready for SetupLending. Accepts any UTXO of that asset and splits off the exact amount needed.

inputs.description: Any wallet UTXO holding PRINCIPAL_ASSET_ID (at least PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT sat).

outputs.description: Exact PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT sat ready for SetupLending principal_in.

lending_contract.description: P2P collateralised lending contract. One instance per loan offer. Created by IssueUtilityNFTs; advanced through LockCollateral, SetupLending, RepayLoan / LiquidateAfterExpiry, and ClaimPrincipalWithInterest.

IssueUtilityNFTs.description: Borrower issues four Liquid NFTs (Borrower NFT, Lender NFT, First/Second Parameters NFTs). Computes all covenant hashes and writes the instance file.

BORROWER_PUB_KEY.description: Borrower's BIP340 Schnorr public key. Used for cancellation authorization and as the destination for the principal output.

COLLATERAL_ASSET_ID.description: Liquid asset ID of the collateral (e.g., L-BTC).

COLLATERAL_AMOUNT.description: Exact collateral amount in asset base units.

COLLATERAL_DECIMALS_MANTISSA.description: Decimal exponent of the collateral asset (e.g., 8 for L-BTC). Used for parameter NFT encoding.

PRINCIPAL_ASSET_ID.description: Liquid asset ID of the loan currency (e.g., L-USDT).

PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT.description: Exact principal amount requested, in asset base units.

PRINCIPAL_DECIMALS_MANTISSA.description: Decimal exponent of the principal asset.

PRINCIPAL_INTEREST_RATE.description: Interest rate in basis points (10,000 = 100%). Max 65,535 basis points.

LOAN_EXPIRATION_TIME.description: Block height at or after which the lender may liquidate (CLTV).

set.compile_params.SECOND_PARAMETERS_ENCODED: params.COLLATERAL_AMOUNT / pow(10, COLLATERAL_DECIMALS_MANTISSA) + params.PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT / pow(10, PRINCIPAL_DECIMALS_MANTISSA) * 33554432

inputs.description: Wallet UTXO whose outpoint determines BORROWER_NFT_ASSET_ID.
Wallet UTXO whose outpoint determines LENDER_NFT_ASSET_ID.
Wallet UTXO whose outpoint determines FIRST_PARAMETERS_NFT_ASSET_ID.
Wallet UTXO whose outpoint determines SECOND_PARAMETERS_NFT_ASSET_ID.

outputs.description: Borrower auth NFT. Amount=1, no reissuance.
Lender auth NFT. Amount=1, no reissuance.
First Parameter NFT carrying bit-packed loan terms in amount field.
Second Parameter NFT carrying bit-packed base amounts in amount field.

LockCollateral.description: Borrower locks collateral and all four Utility NFTs into their covenant addresses, creating the open offer on-chain.

inputs.description: Wallet L-BTC UTXO covering the transaction fee.

outputs.description: Borrower NFT locked in prelock ScriptAuth.
Lender NFT locked in prelock ScriptAuth.
First Parameter NFT locked in prelock ScriptAuth.
Second Parameter NFT locked in prelock ScriptAuth.

validations.description: Collateral input must exactly match COLLATERAL_AMOUNT.

error.message: Collateral input amount does not match COLLATERAL_AMOUNT

CancelOffer.description: Borrower cancels the open offer. Requires BORROWER_PUB_KEY signature. Collateral returned; all Utility NFTs burned. Spends pre_lock via PATH::RIGHT.

inputs.description: First Parameter NFT in prelock ScriptAuth (index 1).
Second Parameter NFT in prelock ScriptAuth (index 2).

SetupLending.description: Lender activates the loan by spending the pre_lock covenant (PATH::LEFT). Collateral moves to LendingCovenant; principal delivered to borrower.

inputs.description: First Parameter NFT in prelock ScriptAuth (index 1).
Second Parameter NFT in prelock ScriptAuth (index 2).
Lender's wallet UTXO providing the principal.
Wallet L-BTC for fees (optional if principal is L-BTC).

outputs.description: First Parameter NFT under lending ScriptAuth (output 2).
Second Parameter NFT under lending ScriptAuth (output 3).

ClaimLoanFunds.description: As a borrower, claim the funds from a p2pk.simf into a normal wallet output.

inputs.description: Wallet L-BTC for fees (optional if principal is L-BTC).

RepayLoan.description: Borrower repays principal+interest and reclaims collateral. Spends lending_collateral via PATH::LEFT.

inputs.description: First Parameter NFT in lending ScriptAuth (index 1).
Second Parameter NFT in lending ScriptAuth (index 2).
Wallet L-BTC for fees (optional if principal is L-BTC).

outputs.description: Principal+interest to lender vault at LENDER_PRINCIPAL_COV_HASH (output 1).

LiquidateAfterExpiry.description: Lender claims collateral after loan expiry. Spends lending_collateral via PATH::RIGHT.

inputs.description: First Parameter NFT in lending ScriptAuth (index 1).
Second Parameter NFT in lending ScriptAuth (index 2).

validations.description: Current block height must be >= LOAN_EXPIRATION_TIME.

error.message: Loan has not yet expired. Cannot liquidate before LOAN_EXPIRATION_TIME.

ClaimPrincipalWithInterest.description: Lender withdraws principal+interest from the lender_principal_vault by co-spending and burning the Lender NFT.

lender_destination.description: Lender's address to receive the principal+interest.
